# GH Copilot settings

<!-- source: 05-github-copilot.qmd, sections "3. Code completion settings", "Other options" (Indexing, Configure code completions, Next edit suggestions, Premium requests), "LLM choice", "BYOK" -->

Tuning completion behaviour, next-edit suggestions, indexing, model choice and bring-your-own-key.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge on tweaking a Copilot setting and observing the effect.
:::
